avatarScaling.title: Avatar Scaling
avatarScaling.subtitle: VRChat's native OSC height scaling — works on any avatar
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Hotkeys work globally (even while VRChat has focus). If a key won't record, you can still use the slider above.
translator.title: Translator
translator.aiGrammarFix: Fix grammar with AI first (uses the IntelliChat provider above)
translator.note: Used by the Live Typing chatbox translation option and anywhere else in the app that offers "Translate before sending."
liveTyping.title: Live Typing
liveTyping.subtitle: sends as you type, like VRChat's own chatbox
liveTyping.placeholder: Type here — this sends to the chatbox automatically every few seconds as you type. Keep typing past 144 chars; VRChat will show '…' + the end of your message.
languagePicker.title: Choose your language
languagePicker.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
settingsLanguage.title: Language
settingsLanguage.label: App language
